title: cousinia silyboides subsp. silyboides
intro: Cousinia silyboides subsp. silyboides, also known as Cousinia, is a flowering plant species belonging to the family Asteraceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. Cousinia has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, and is believed to offer health benefits such as pain relief, improved immune function, and reduced inflammation. Cousinia can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for internal use, or applied topically in the form of creams or ointments.
